# StadiumPulse AI

StadiumPulse AI is a GenAI-powered intelligent stadium operations and fan experience platform designed for the FIFA World Cup 2026.

## Architecture & Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Database / Auth**: Supabase
- **UI State**: AppContext / AuthProvider

## Core URLs & Navigation

- `/` - Public Landing Page
- `/login` - Portal Sign In
- `/register` - Portal Sign Up
- `/forgot-password` - Account Recovery

## Core Modules (Protected Dashboards)

- `/fan` - Spectator Hub (Tickets, Queue wait times, Food concierge)
- `/operator` - Facilities Command (Sensors state, network speed control)
- `/organizer` - FIFA Event Operations (Gate allocations, revenue stats)
- `/security` - Tactical Command Room (Incident reports, live CCTV feeds)
- `/volunteer` - Volunteer Tasks Board (Assignments, sector check-ins)
- `/accessibility` - Accessible Route Configurator & Services
- `/ai` - Command Operations Assistant (Incident summarizer)
- `/feature` - Food Ordering & queue wait estimates
- `/notifications` - Operational alerts logs & notifications
- `/profile` - Credentials & user profile settings
- `/result` - Match results & gate traffic analytics
- `/settings` - Theme & Accessibility preferences settings
